title: Executive Order 7415—Partial Revocation of Certain Executive Orders Withdrawing Public Lands for Use as Air Navigation Sites

flags.justification: This revokes prior land withdrawals no longer needed for their original purpose, reducing rather than concentrating authority.
Single coherent purpose covering land in two states, not a bundling of distinct issues.
A land-status revocation creating no compliance regime.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A revocation action returning land to normal status, not a continuing authority grant requiring its own sunset.
This releases land from federal reservation, the opposite of removing oversight.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
An extremely narrow, technical, routine land-management housekeeping action.
No second agency or mandate is implicated.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.
